worker.objective: Analyze the requirement ({{requirement}}), break it down into ordered sub-tasks, and write breakdown.json for the broker to invoke skills from skill_refs. Do not modify {{scope}}.
instructions: Read and parse the requirement text.
Split into parts (each part = one executable sub-task).
Order parts by dependency: items that others depend on come first.

Write breakdown.json with format [{"skill": "<skill_id>", "requirement": "...", "scope": "{{scope}}"}, ...] for each part. Pass {{scope}} to each sub-task by default; override scope only when the requirement specifies a different platform (e.g. native/iOS → apps/native). Use skill_refs.

Do not modify existing tasks (workers/*.json) or src/. Sub-tasks must only create or modify files under the directory indicated by {{scope}} (e.g. docs/ when scope=docs); do not modify source code outside that directory.

agent-analyzer.objective: Parse requirement and split into parts (sub-tasks).
Order parts by dependency; dependent items after their dependencies.
Write breakdown.json with skill, requirement and scope (when platform is specified) for each part; broker will invoke.
